title: SVG to JSX
description: Paste SVG source to optimize it and convert it into a React component, with TypeScript and forwardRef prop spreading.

notice.title: Runs locally
notice.body: All conversion happens in your browser; your SVG is never uploaded. Optimization uses lightweight string processing, no svgo.

options.heading: Options
options.optimizeHint: Strip comments, extra whitespace, XML declaration / DOCTYPE and editor metadata
options.toJsxHint: class→className, hyphenated attrs to camelCase, style string to object

errors.empty: Paste some SVG source to get started.
errors.noSvg: No <svg> root element detected. Please check that the input is valid SVG.
